sub: Governments, publishers and development organisations across 25+ countries trust us to get the job done, on spec, on schedule, every time. That's not a coincidence, it's the standard we hold ourselves to.

africa.name: Africa
africa.body: Our largest export market. We partner with Ministries of Education across Nigeria, Kenya, Uganda, Ghana, Cameroon, Rwanda, Tanzania, Zambia, Côte d'Ivoire, DR Congo and more to deliver World Bank, USAID and UN funded education projects.

asia.name: Asia
asia.body: End-to-end solutions, print, kit, pack and deliver direct to schools, eliminating operational challenges for publishers and institutions across India, UAE, and expanding further.

europe.name: USA, Europe & Latin America
europe.body: Activity books, trade books, colouring books and stationery supplied to leading publishers and major retail chains across USA, UK, Mexico, Spain and Germany.

ledger.heroStory: Books for the Tanzania Institute of Education: 4M of them delivered within 60 days.
ledger.heroStoryFallback: Books for a national education programme: 4M of them delivered within 60 days.
